title: Crunchy Corn American Barramundi Wrap
description: A savory and crunchy American dish featuring barramundi, served in a corn husk wrap, perfect for a lazy Sunday lunch.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, cornmeal, salt, and pepper.
Pour the buttermilk into a separate shallow dish.
Dip each barramundi fillet into the buttermilk, coating completely, then roll in the flour mixture to coat.
Carefully place the coated barramundi fillets into the hot oil and fry for 4-5 minutes on each side, until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the fried barramundi from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Warm the corn husks by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a fried barramundi fillet onto a warmed corn husk, then topping with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, and any desired additional toppings.
Garnish with additional lettuce, tomatoes, and a dollop of your favorite sauce, if desired.
